line_of_business: Engaged in private hospital activities and private clinic activities
company_overview: JEC Eye Hospitals & Clinics is the commercial name of PT Nitrasanata Dharma which was founded on February 1 1984 with the initial name Jakarta Eye Clinic (KMJ). As service quality improved, the Company changed its name to Jakarta Eye Center (JEC) in 1993 and developed into a specialist eye hospital with quality service standards and the latest technological support. In order to support business growth, JEC opened various facilities and expanded the service network, including the construction of a hotel and green building concept in Kedoya in 2012, as well as the opening and development of clinics and hospitals in various regions of Indonesia through organic expansion, mergers, acquisitions and strategic partnerships since 2015. These expansion efforts cover the Jadetabek, Central Java, East Java, Bali and Sulawesi areas. Through a sustainable growth strategy, the Company Group has developed into an integrated eye health service network with national reach.,  , The Company Group has a vision for optimizing vision and quality of life. Furthermore, to achieve this vision, the Company Group has a mission to provide international standard clinical services, provide services that exceed patient expectations, apply the latest and most trusted technology, and develop the competence of doctors and staff, through research and education.,  , Until this publication, the Company Group has owned and operated 5 special eye hospitals and 11 eye clinics spread across various regions in Indonesia. This network of health service facilities allows the Company to reach more people and provide wider access to quality eye health services.

line_of_business: Engaged in the manufacturing and processing of medical devices related to medical diagnosis
company_overview: PT Prodia Diagnostic Line Tbk (“Company” or “PRDL”), is a manufacturer of In Vitro Diagnostic (IVD) medical devices. Established in 2010 in Indonesia, the Company is a pioneer producer of domestic IVD reagents and instruments which is committed to providing superior quality products and services with strict quality standards. Business Activities The Company positions itself as a production and assembly company for diagnostic medical equipment. The Company's aims and objectives are the Medical Devices Industry in Subclass 2101 (KBLI Code: 21015), Electronic Measuring Instruments and Test Equipment Industry (KBLI Code: 26513), Wholesale Trade in Laboratory Equipment, Pharmaceutical Equipment and Medical Equipment for Humans (KBLI Code: 46691), Calibration/Methodology Services (KBLI Code: 71205) and Testing and/or Calibration Activities for Medical Devices and Inspection of Health Infrastructure (KBLI Code: 71208). , To achieve these aims and objectives, the Company carries out its main business activities, namely the Medical Equipment Industry and Subclass 2101, which includes the business of manufacturing and processing medical equipment related to medical diagnosis. The Company also carries out supporting activities, including calibration laboratory activities to check/test measuring instruments or calibration tools, then regular maintenance, testing and/or calibration services for health equipment and inspection of health infrastructure, manufacture of analytical instruments, scales, balances and laboratory incubators and other laboratory equipment. The Company also carries out wholesale trading business activities for laboratory equipment, pharmaceutical equipment and medical equipment. , the Company produces and assembles medical devices under its own brands, distributor brands and principal brands which are grouped into four main categories, namely Clinical Chemistry, Hematology, Immunology and Biomolecular, and Instruments, with around 1,083 active SKUs. Supported by an extensive distribution network, the Company has reached 370 of 514 districts/cities in 38 provinces in Indonesia and served 7,611 end users from the government and private sectors, strengthening the Company's position as a trusted partner in meeting diagnostic needs in Indonesia. More complete information about the Company's business activities can be seen in the Preliminary Prospectus document.
address: Kawasan Industri Jababeka III Jl. Tekno Boulevard Blok A3 Unit 3A-5-6 Jawa Barat, 17530 - Indonesia

line_of_business: Engaged in the Food and Dessert Beverage Industry
company_overview: PT Niramas Utama Tbk ("Company" or "JELI"), which is more widely known through its main trademark "INACO", is a pioneer and market leader in the healthy food and dessert industry based on coconut and natural fiber in Indonesia which has been established since 1990. For more than 35 years, the Company has consistently strengthened its position as a top of mind brand through its high commitment to providing delicious, safe and highly nutritious products for families, with superior product lines that include Nata de Coco in various flavors, mini jellies, puddings, to innovative ready-to-drink beverage products such as I'm Coco and Jelly Drink. The Company differentiates itself through the use of high quality natural raw materials, including pure coconut milk which is processed through strict international food safety standards and a final pasteurization stage to ensure product quality and uses food additives that comply with food safety regulations. The Company's operational strength is supported by world-class manufacturing facilities and an extensive distribution network covering 251 domestic distribution points, as well as success in penetrating strategic international markets such as Japan, India, China, Thailand, Australia, Canada and the United States. Through a focus on sustainable innovation and development of natural-based products such as Aloe vera and konnyaku, the Company continues to transform to capture opportunities from the global healthy lifestyle megatrend driven by the Millennial Generation and Gen Z, while providing a positive social impact by supporting local farmers as the main raw material supplier partners. With various prestigious awards already achieved, the Company is committed to continuing to improve its research and development capabilities through the Ideas Bank system and expanding its global footprint to Africa and Europe by 2026, to ensure resilient and sustainable business growth in the future.
